## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and removed unrelated edits.
- [ ] I updated docs for public behavior, API, or setup changes.
- [ ] I ran relevant tests or explained why they were not run.
- [ ] My commits are signed off for DCO compliance (`git commit -s`).
